name: Path Equivalence: Windows 8.3 Filename
description: The product restricts access to a file using its long filename but does not account for the equivalent Windows 8.3 short filename (e.g., 'PROGRA~1' for 'Program Files'), allowing attackers to access the restricted file via its short name alias.
detection_pattern: CONTROL[path_check] validates against long filenames but the Windows filesystem also accepts 8.3 short name equivalents at STORAGE[file_access], creating a bypass where INGRESS provides the short name form that the check doesn't recognize as equivalent
